scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:hostinger: npm exec --yes -- pnpm@9.15.9 install --prod=false && npm exec --yes -- pnpm@9.15.9 --filter @workspace/ayotrix run build && npm exec --yes -- pnpm@9.15.9 --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node scripts/copy-frontend-to-api.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
